requirement_topic.en: SNE Grid Connection — 220/380 V 50 Hz Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: SNE并网接入——220/380 V 50 Hz项目验收
requirement_topic.zht: SNE併網接入——220/380 V 50 Hz項目驗收

summary.en: Chad operates a 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz electricity framework for general low-voltage interconnection. Any EV charger connected to public supply should be treated as a site acceptance matter under SNE or the relevant utility project workflow, including supply-capacity review, protection settings, metering, earthing, harmonic data, commissioning documentation, and installer qualification. The nominal voltage match with China is favourable; project-specific settings remain critical.
summary.zh: 乍得采用220 V单相/380 V三相、50 Hz的电压体系。任何接入公共供电的电动汽车充电桩都应按SNE或场站电力运营项目流程处理，包括供电容量、保护设定、计量、接地、谐波数据、调试文件和安装资质。与中国名义值一致是优势，但项目设置仍是关键。
summary.zht: 乍得採用220 V單相/380 V三相、50 Hz的電壓體系。任何接入公共供電的電動汽車充電樁均應按SNE或場站電力運營項目流程處理，包括供電容量、保護設定、計量、接地、諧波數據、調試文件和安裝資質。與中國名義值一致是優勢，但項目設置仍是關鍵。

standards_or_laws: SNE project connection and commissioning requirements
IEC 61851-1 — EV conductive charging system general requirements
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality

summary.en: China domestic charging equipment is documented to GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connectors, and GB/T 27930 communication with local acceptance routes. This supports baseline quality but cannot replace Chad project-level grid and commissioning acceptance under SNE workflows.
summary.zh: 中国充电设备通常按GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准及GB/T 27930通信进行文件化，并配合当地验收路径。该路径可支撑工程质量基线，但不能替代乍得SNE流程下的项目级并网与调试验收。
summary.zht: 中國充電設備通常按GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234介面標準及GB/T 27930通訊進行文件化，並配合當地驗收路徑。該路徑可支援工程質量基線，但不能替代乍得SNE流程下的項目級併網與調試驗收。

gap.en: Exporters should confirm input range, protective-device ratings, earthing system, metering, harmonic currents, surge control, and commissioning deliverables for each Chad site. Even with matching voltage and frequency, approval is denied if project documents do not reflect local operation assumptions.
gap.zh: 出口商需确认每个乍得场站的输入范围、保护器件额定值、接地系统、计量、谐波电流、浪涌控制和调试交付物。即便电压和频率匹配，若文档未体现本地运行假设，仍可能无法批准。
gap.zht: 出口商需確認每個乍得場站的輸入範圍、保護設備額定值、接地系統、計量、諧波電流、浪湧控制和調試交付物。即便電壓和頻率匹配，若文件未反映本地運行假設，仍可能無法批准。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected installations where SNE or local utility acceptance is required
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese local-grid acceptance does not replace Chad project acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The 220/380 V 50 Hz match lowers conversion burden, but project acceptance in Chad still requires site-specific protection coordination, harmonics, commissioning, and documentation aligned to SNE workflow.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 220/380 V 50 Hz的对齐降低了变换负担，但乍得的项目验收仍需站点级保护协调、谐波、调试和符合SNE流程的完整文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 220/380 V 50 Hz的對齊降低了轉換負擔，但乍得的項目驗收仍需站點級保護協調、諧波、調試和符合SNE流程的完整文件。
